dialogues.speaker: Ashbend Medic
lines: The ash dries out wounds fast, but it leaves the body tired.
Rest here before you enter the mine.
Your party is healed and ready.

dialogues.speaker: Ashbend Medic
lines: The air is easier to breathe since Cindralith settled.
I'll still patch up your party before you travel on.

dialogues.speaker: Mine Watch
lines: Ashbend Mine is open, but the deep tunnel is shaking.
Something Ember and Stone is holding the shortcut closed.

dialogues.speaker: Mine Watch
lines: The deep tunnel is stable again.
The shortcut near the east wall will take you through cleanly now.

dialogues.speaker: Ash Surveyor
lines: Coalboar tracks lead into the old haulage route.
If the tunnel rumbles, step away from cracked stone.

dialogues.speaker: Ash Surveyor
lines: Those cracks have gone quiet.
Cindralith must have been pressing against the whole mine.

dialogues.speaker: Camp Villager
lines: We came east after the watermill started turning again.
Now the mine is the only thing between Emberpass and a safe road.

dialogues.speaker: Camp Villager
lines: You cleared Ashbend Mine.
People are already packing supplies for the route beyond Emberpass.

dialogues.speaker: Ashbend Elder
lines: Traveler from the west, you ended the watermill's silence.
Now Ashbend Mine asks the same courage.
Find Cindralith in the heart tunnel and calm the Emberpass.

dialogues.speaker: Ashbend Elder
lines: The mine is clear, and Emberpass can breathe again.
Trial Grove, Old Watermill, and Ashbend Mine now stand behind you.

dialogues.speaker: Shortcut Marker
lines: Shortcut sealed by mine pressure.
Clear the heart tunnel before using this passage.

dialogues.speaker: Shortcut Marker
lines: Shortcut open.
East passage leads back through Ashbend Mine.
